summary: Iteration 152 - Testing 5 bug fixes. All 9 features verified successfully. UnifiedClientOverview tabs show Goals (replaced Budget). Client sidebar has no Budget/Compliance. Adviser sidebar has Compliance under Execution group. Report Generator creates mock reports with Halcyon Wealth branding and PDF download. /client-portal loads without crashing showing Thompson family data (Net Worth $1,608,800). Adviser Compliance Dashboard 'View escalation pathways' button switches to Escalation tab.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts still render correctly but warnings appear in console
Console shows 'Failed to fetch client data' error initially but page still loads with data - may be a race condition or duplicate fetch

critical_code_review_comments: TEST 1 - UnifiedClientOverview Tabs: PASS - Goals tab visible, Budget tab removed. Tabs: Overview, Actions, Retirement, Investments, Goals, Tax Centre, Profile
TEST 2 - Client Context Sidebar: PASS - No Budget or Compliance in client sidebar (Overview, Documents, Planning groups)
TEST 3 - Dashboard Numbers: PASS - Net Worth $1,608,800 displayed correctly
TEST 4 - Adviser Sidebar Compliance: PASS - Compliance found under EXECUTION group (Batch Execute, Meeting Prep, Compliance)
TEST 5 - Report Generator: PASS - Mock reports generate without 'Failed to generate' error, Halcyon Wealth branding present, Thompson family data shown, Download PDF button visible
TEST 6 - /client-portal: PASS - Page loads without crashing, shows Thompson family data, Net Worth $1,608,800 displayed
TEST 7 - Adviser Compliance Escalation: PASS - 'View escalation pathways' button clicks and switches to Escalation tab showing L1-L4 escalation levels
TEST 8 - Backend API: PASS - /api/client-portal/dashboard/portal_001 returns correct Thompson family data with net_worth: 1608800
TEST 9 - No JavaScript Errors: PASS - No error boundaries visible, pages load correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Thompson family mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified. Key routes tested: /dashboard (UnifiedClientOverview with Goals tab), /advisor-command-center (adviser sidebar with Compliance under Execution), /reports (Report Generator with PDF download), /client-portal (Thompson family data), /adviser-compliance (escalation button). Report generation is fully client-side using jsPDF. Client portal API returns mock Thompson data.

unified_client_overview_tabs.details: Goals tab visible (replaced Budget). All 7 tabs present: Overview, Actions, Retirement, Investments, Goals, Tax Centre, Profile

client_sidebar_no_budget_compliance.details: Client context sidebar shows Overview, Documents, Planning groups - no Budget or Compliance items

adviser_sidebar_compliance.details: Compliance found under EXECUTION group in adviser sidebar (Batch Execute, Meeting Prep, Compliance)

report_generator_mock_reports.details: Report Generator creates mock reports client-side, no 'Failed to generate' errors, Halcyon Wealth branding present

report_pdf_download.details: Download PDF button visible and functional (uses jsPDF for client-side PDF generation)

client_portal_loads.details: /client-portal loads without crashing, shows Thompson family data with Net Worth $1,608,800

adviser_compliance_escalation.details: 'View escalation pathways' button switches to Escalation tab showing L1-L4 escalation levels

dashboard_numbers_consistency.details: Net Worth $1,608,800 consistent across dashboard and client portal

mocked_apis_list: Report generation is client-side (no backend API)
Client portal API returns mock Thompson data
